defaultConfig.title: list_metrics
defaultConfig.description: List all available metrics collected by the Mashroom metrics collector. Returns metric name, type (counter, gauge, histogram, observable-counter, observable-gauge), description, and data point count.

defaultConfig.title: get_metric
defaultConfig.description: Get detailed data for a specific metric by name. Returns all data points with their values, attributes (labels), and timestamps. Use this after finding a metric with "list_metrics".

defaultConfig.title: get_metric_summary
defaultConfig.description: Get a summary of all current metric values in a compact format. Shows the latest value for each metric with its type and unit. Useful for a quick overview of system health.

defaultConfig.title: search_metrics
defaultConfig.description: Search metrics by name pattern (substring match). Returns matching metric names, types, and descriptions. Use this to find specific metrics when you know part of the name.

defaultConfig.title: get_metric_histogram_buckets
defaultConfig.description: Get histogram bucket details for a specific metric. Shows bucket boundaries, counts, sum, min, and max values. Only works for histogram-type metrics.
